sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_name VARCHAR, event_date DATE, numeric_value INT);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES ('Event A', DATE '1970-01-01', 0), ('Event B', DATE '1992-02-15', 5), ('Event C', DATE '2030-01-01', 10);
SELECT event_name, epoch(event_date) AS epoch_value, (epoch(event_date)!5) AS factorial_epoch FROM test_dates WHERE epoch(event_date) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT event_name, epoch(event_date) AS epoch_value FROM test_dates WHERE epoch(event_date) > (SELECT AVG(epoch(event_date)) FROM test_dates) - 1;

SELECT nf.factor_value, (epoch(event_date)!nf.factor_value) AS factorial_epoch_value FROM test_dates t JOIN numeric_factors nf ON nf.factor_value <= (epoch(t.event_date)!4) GROUP BY nf.factor_value, t.event_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

SELECT event_name, (NULLIF(epoch(event_date), 0)!2) AS factorial_result FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < DATE '2030-01-01' UNION SELECT event_name, epoch(DATE '2020-01-01')!3 AS factorial_result FROM test_dates WHERE epoch(event_date) IS NULL;
SELECT event_name, epoch(event_date) AS epoch_value FROM test_dates WHERE epoch(event_date) BETWEEN 0 AND (epoch(DATE '1990-01-01')!4);
ALTER TABLE test_dates ADD COLUMN event_id SERIAL;
SELECT event_name, event_id, epoch(event_date)!3 AS factorial_epoch FROM test_dates WHERE epoch(event_date) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY factorial_epoch DESC;
